hooks.command: [ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_CODEX_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks feed --source codex --event PermissionRequest || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_CODEX_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks feed --source codex --event PreToolUse || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_CODEX_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks codex session-start || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_CODEX_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks codex stop || echo '{}'
[ -n "$CMUX_SURFACE_ID" ] && [ "$CMUX_CODEX_HOOKS_DISABLED" != "1" ] && command -v cmux >/dev/null 2>&1 && cmux hooks codex prompt-submit || echo '{}'
